content.text: 请根据截图分析页面内容和状态，选择操作路径：XML方式：用 get_screen_xml 获取节点，点击用坐标调 click，输入用 innerid 调 input_text；视觉方式：用 ai_click(text/icon) 点击，用 ai_set_text 输入，用 ai_seq_click 批量点击。不要根据截图自行估算坐标。

content.text:
The device is stuck on a MIUI AOD/lock screen and not responding to swipes or taps to unlock. The connected device appears to be a real MIUI phone, not an AndroidWorld emulator, and Simple SMS Messenger is unlikely to be installed. I cannot proceed with the task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on a MIUI AOD/lock screen throughout — swipe-up unlock gesture, repeated taps, press_home, and direct open_app for com.simplemobiletools.smsmessenger all returned success at the API level but the screen never left the dim lock view. Could not reach the home screen or any messenger UI to copy text or send a message.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot returned a near-black AOD-style image showing only faint time digits (≈16:3...) and dim wallpaper artifacts; no app UI was ever visible."], "failure_reason": "Device is on a MIUI keyguard / AOD that does not respond to swipe-up unlock or touch-to-wake via the available MCP tools (no wake/power-button or PIN-entry tool exposed). Without unlocking, I cannot launch Simple SMS Messenger, copy to clipboard, or send the message."}

result:
The device is stuck on a MIUI AOD/lock screen and not responding to swipes or taps to unlock. The connected device appears to be a real MIUI phone, not an AndroidWorld emulator, and Simple SMS Messenger is unlikely to be installed. I cannot proceed with the task.

{"success": false, "confidence": 0.95, "evidence_summary": "Device remained on a MIUI AOD/lock screen throughout — swipe-up unlock gesture, repeated taps, press_home, and direct open_app for com.simplemobiletools.smsmessenger all returned success at the API level but the screen never left the dim lock view. Could not reach the home screen or any messenger UI to copy text or send a message.", "screenshot_paths": ["MCP get_screenshot returned a near-black AOD-style image showing only faint time digits (≈16:3...) and dim wallpaper artifacts; no app UI was ever visible."], "failure_reason": "Device is on a MIUI keyguard / AOD that does not respond to swipe-up unlock or touch-to-wake via the available MCP tools (no wake/power-button or PIN-entry tool exposed). Without unlocking, I cannot launch Simple SMS Messenger, copy to clipboard, or send the message."}
